failure.symptom: PrismaClientInitializationError: Environment variable not found: DATABASE_URL. Backend requires PostgreSQL (schema.prisma provider=postgresql, url=env(DATABASE_URL)).
attempted: npm install 成功，npm run dev 启动 NestJS backend 但 Prisma 初始化失败，缺少 DATABASE_URL
failure.recommendation: 跳过，需要 PostgreSQL 数据库
